title: Shylar
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Shylar.jpg]] |name=Shylar |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]''[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Really, ''Master Shylar'', is this necessary? We've known each other a long time. It grieves me to have to do this.|Dooku, while torturing Shylar|}} '''Shylar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she tried to infiltrate the headquarters of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] leader and [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. However, Shylar was captured and subsequently [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] to [[Death/Legends|death]] by Dooku and his [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Kadrian Sey]]. Her old friend and fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], with whom she had a romantic relationship earlier in her life, was unable to save her, as he acted as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for the Jedi in Dooku's inner circle. ==Biography== {{Quote|I will ''die'' before I talk, Dooku.''"
"''No. You will talk and ''then'' you will die. All of the mind tricks you know to control pain are known to me as well. And, I know to ''circumvent'' them. You will suffer, you will tell me what you learned while you were sneaking around my camps, and you will die. Painfully. Increase the power, Kadrian.|Shylar and Dooku|}} A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Shylar lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. At some point during her youth, Shylar had a relationship with fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]. However, as the Order [[Jedi Code/Legends|forbade]] romantic attachment of its members, both eventually ended their relationship. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] broke out between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the latter led by Jedi-turned-[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. [[File:ShylarQuinlan.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Padawans Shylar and Quinlan Vos]] Six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the beginning of the war, Shylar volunteered to infiltrate Dooku's [[Dooku's Antar 4 headquarters|headquarters]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]] as one of the agents of Jedi Master [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]]. However, she was captured and soon became the subject of intensive [[Torture/Legends|torture]] by Dooku and [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] [[Kadrian Sey]], who held her in a [[Containment field/Legends|containment field]]. Shylar refused to reveal any information about her mission, although Dooku was unimpressed and simply continued interrogating her. During one of these torture sessions, Shylar's old friend Vos—similarly on assignment to infiltrate Dooku's inner circle—returned from a mission for the Count. Shylar was furious upon seeing Vos, cursing him and calling him a traitor to the Order. Vos, unable to help his friend unless he wanted his cover exposed, was forced to let her anguish continue. Shylar was eventually [[Death/Legends|killed]] during another torture session. After eventually withdrawing from the Confederacy in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], Vos reported back to Tholme and the [[Council of Reconciliation/Legends|Council of Reconciliation]], the Jedi Order's body that passed judgment over fallen Jedi. Detailing his interaction with Shylar in Dooku's retreat, he cleared her name of any suspicion of being a possible traitor, as the Order had no information about her status. Vos revealed his relationship with Shylar to the Council and would fight the rest of the war hoping to one [[Standard day/Legends|day]] atone for the death of his old friend.[[Republic 75|''Republic'' 75]] ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Years ago, when we were young Padawans, Shylar and I… had a relationship. You never knew about it, Master. We eventually broke it off; we knew that to be Jedi, we could not allow ourselves possessions, including each other. Part of me loved Shylar; always will. She died thinking me a traitor and cursing my name.|Quinlan Vos, to Tholme and the Council of Reconciliation|}} Shylar and Quinlan Vos chose to break off their relationship, as it would have meant leaving the Jedi path. She became upset upon seeing Vos aligned with the Separatist leader Dooku during the Clone Wars, cursing his name and insulting him. She was able to endure enormous torture at the hands of Dooku and remained defiant, vowing to tell the Count nothing. Shylar had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] as well as light skin. ==Behind the scenes== Shylar first appeared in ''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]'' ([[2003]]), the fourth issue of the [[Star Wars: Jedi (one-shots)|''Star Wars: Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], written by [[John Ostrander]] and drawn by [[Jan Duursema]]. Shylar again appeared, although only in a flashback, in the [[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] comic ([[2004]]), also created by Ostrander and Duursema. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]'' {{1st}} *[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] {{Flash}} {{Hologram}} *[[Republic 75|''Republic'' 75]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile|134|TYR 1-2|Rise of a Tyrant}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Shylar}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |da=Shylar |de=Shylar#legends |hu=Shylar |pl=Shylar |deGA=1 }} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
